pages.text: <?xml version="1.0"?> <gc:Codelist xmlns:gc="http://docs.oasis-open.org/codelist/ns/genericode/1.0/"> <gc:Identification> <gc:ShortName Lang="en">Payment means codes used in AE</gc:ShortName> <gc:Version>D.16B</gc:Version> </gc:Identification> <gc:ColumnSet> <gc:Column Id="id" Use="required"> <gc:ShortName>Identifier</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Column Id="name" Use="optional"> <gc:ShortName>Name</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Column Id="description" Use="optional"> <gc:ShortName>Description</gc:ShortName> <gc:Data Type="string"/> </gc:Column> <gc:Key Id="idKey"> <gc:ColumnRef Ref="id"/> </gc:Key> </gc:ColumnSet> <gc:SimpleCodeList> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>1</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Instrument not defined</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Not defined legally enforceable agreement between two or more parties (expressing a contractual right or a right to the payment of money).</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>10</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>In cash</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Payment by currency (including bills and coins) in circulation, including checking account deposits.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>20</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Cheque</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Payment by a pre-printed form on which instructions are given to an account holder (a bank or building society) to pay a stated sum to a named recipient.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>21</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Banker's draft</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Issue of a banker's draft in payment of the funds.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>30</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Credit transfer</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Payment by credit movement of funds from one account to another.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>49</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Direct debit</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>The amount is to be, or has been, directly debited to the customer's bank account.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>54</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Credit card</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Payment made by means of credit card.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>55</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Debit card</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Payment made by means of debit card.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> <gc:Row> <gc:Value ColumnRef="id"> <gc:SimpleValue>68</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="name"> <gc:SimpleValue>Online payment service</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> <gc:Value ColumnRef="description"> <gc:SimpleValue>Payment will be made or has been made by an online payment service.</gc:SimpleValue> </gc:Value> </gc:Row> </gc:SimpleCodeList> </gc:Codelist>
